sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ἀμιναδάβ

- Transliteration: aminadab

- Phonetic: am-ee-nad-ab'

- Definition: Amminadab = "one of the prince's people"

1. an ancestor of Christ

- Origin: of hebrew origin H5992

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Of hebrew origin [H5992]; Aminadab an Israelite: - Aminadab.
